title: Barzillay #1271
definition:
Barzillai = "my iron"

 1) a Gileadite leader who helped David defeat Absalom's rebellion
 2) a priest, son-in-law to Barzillai the Gileadite
 3) an Israelite from Mahalath whose son Adriel married Michal, Saul's
    daughter
